description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, finished in a glossy black color with cream binding along the body and neck. The front features two humbucker pickups, a three-way toggle switch, and four gold control knobs, typical of Les Paul-style guitars. The fretboard is adorned with large rectangular mother-of-pearl inlays, and the headstock has a classic three-per-side tuning peg arrangement. The back of the guitar is also black, with visible screws for the electronics cavity covers. The body is contoured and the neck is set-in, contributing to a robust and premium appearance. Chrome hardware and a tune-o-matic bridge complete the instrument's classic rock aesthetic.
description: A glossy black, single-cutaway electric guitar with cream binding, dual humbuckers, and gold hardware, reminiscent of a Les Paul style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glossy black finish, cream binding, dual humbucker pickups, gold control knobs, and rectangular fretboard inlays.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's thickness, the arched top, and the protruding hardware components.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black back, electronics cavity covers, and the set-in neck joint.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the body depth and the profile of the neck and headstock.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with three tuning pegs per side, no visible logo, classic Les Paul shape
